# arubasdwan_ip_address_groups (Data Source)

Fetches all IP address groups from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/ipObjects/addressGroup.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_ip_address_groups" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `address_groups` (Attributes List) List of address groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--address_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--address_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `address_groups`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Name of the address group.
- `rules` (Attributes List) Rules composing this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--address_groups--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--address_groups--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `address_groups.rules`

Read-Only:

- `comment` (String) Free-form comment.
- `excluded_ips` (List of String) Excluded IPs/CIDRs.
- `included_groups` (List of String) Names of nested address groups.
- `included_ips` (List of String) Included IPs/CIDRs.
